# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: vm
  type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  properties:
    location: <your_location>
    imageReference:
      publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
      offer: WindowsServer
      sku: 2022-Datacenter
      version: latest
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: <your_vm_size>
    storageProfile:
      osDisk:
        createOption: Attach
        diskSizeGB: 128
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
      dataDisks:
        - diskName: data1
          diskSizeGB: 2048
          createOption: Attach
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
    osProfile:
      computerName: <your_computer_name>
      adminUsername: <your_admin_username>
      adminPassword: <your_admin_password>
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - name: nic
          properties:
            ipConfigurations:
              - name: ipconfig
                properties:
                  subnet:
                    id: <your_subnet_id>
                  privateIpAddress: <your_private_ip>
